last_comments: Implemented the strict startup capability contract for G1-02. Adapter-plan validation now rejects `pubsub=redis` unless the cache adapter is also `redis`, and router startup now returns explicit errors for invalid runtime plans or missing realtime notifier wiring instead of warning/falling back. Added/activated scoped tests in `framework/core/adapters/resolve_test.go`, `app/foundation/container_adapters_test.go`, and `app/router_guardrails_test.go`, and synced the architecture/roadmap docs for the fail-fast behavior. Verification: `go test ./app ./app/foundation ./framework/core/adapters`; `docket validate TKT-258`. Documented blocker: `docket validate TKT-195` still fails because the parent ticket file is stale (`write_hash` + missing required handoff subsections), not because of this implementation.
